---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the limitation or pain point.

**Proposed solution**
How you envision this working — both from a user perspective and (if applicable) a technical perspective.

**Art-historical context**
If the feature relates to a specific analytical method, school of thought, or conservation practice, please provide references or context.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative approaches you've thought about.
